characters.name: Thorin Ironforge
characters.backstory: Former mine foreman from the Ironforge clan. Took up adventuring after his mine was overrun by a tribe of goblins. Swore an oath to protect those who cannot protect themselves. Secretly afraid of deep water.

characters.name: Lyra Nightwhisper
characters.backstory: Expelled from the Arcane Academy for 'unauthorized experimentation' — she accidentally set the library on fire. Twice. Now travels with the party to prove her magical talent is an asset, not a liability. Has a rivalry with every other wizard she meets.

characters.name: Brother Aldric
characters.backstory: A quiet, patient healer from a small monastery. Joined the party because a divine vision told him 'these idiots will die without you.' He was right. Has resurrected Thorin three times so far and keeps a tally on his shield.

characters.name: Zix
characters.backstory: Left her goblin tribe because they were 'too boring.' Found the party while trying to pickpocket Thorin — who caught her immediately. Instead of punishment, they offered her a cut of the loot if she'd use her skills for the group. She negotiated a bigger cut. Collects shiny buttons.

characters.name: Bramblewood
characters.backstory: A gentle giant who speaks to plants and prefers the company of animals. Joined the party after they saved a grove of ancient trees from loggers. Refers to everyone by descriptions instead of names — Thorin is 'the small loud one,' Lyra is 'the fire child.' Turns into a bear when stressed.

characters.name: Kael Stormborn
characters.backstory: Last survivor of a dragonborn settlement destroyed by a red dragon. Swore a blood oath to hunt it down. Intensely serious about everything — once challenged a bartender to a duel over a spilled drink. Has never told a joke, but is accidentally hilarious.
